name: Golden Exfolia
positioningLine: Gently buff away dullness. Reveal your natural glow.
safeBenefitClaims: helps reveal brighter-looking skin
gently buffs away the look of dullness
may help improve the appearance of skin texture
formulated to support a healthy-looking glow
designed to gently exfoliate for a refreshed look
emotionalHook: tired of spending on brightening serums that never seem to work
ingredientStory: Turmeric is an Ayurvedic gold standard for radiant skin. Honey seals in moisture while its natural enzymes gently lift dead cells. Oats soothe as they exfoliate — no harsh microbeads, just nature's own buffing agents.

name: Heritage Glow
positioningLine: Ancient glow wisdom, bottled in handmade cold-process soap.
safeBenefitClaims: may help support a brighter-looking complexion
designed for skin that looks and feels dry
formulated with ingredients traditionally used for a luminous look
may help skin feel softer and more comfortable
supports the look of a nourished, healthy complexion
emotionalHook: your skin deserves ingredients that have stood the test of centuries
ingredientStory: Kesar (saffron) has been used in Indian households for centuries to brighten and even skin tone. Combined with turmeric, sandalwood, and almond oil, Heritage Glow is a tribute to time-tested Ayurvedic wisdom.

name: Radiance Glow
positioningLine: Even out. Lighten up. Glow naturally.
safeBenefitClaims: may help support a more even-looking skin tone
designed to help reduce the appearance of dark spots over time
formulated with brightening ingredients traditionally used in Indian beauty
may help skin appear more radiant and luminous
supports the look of a clearer, brighter complexion
emotionalHook: skin so even-toned you stop reaching for the beauty filter
ingredientStory: Milk proteins gently exfoliate while saffron and zafran — both prized in Indian and Persian beauty traditions — work together to support a more luminous, even-looking complexion.

name: Rose Revive
positioningLine: Calm, gentle, and deeply comforting for sensitive skin.
safeBenefitClaims: designed to gently cleanse without irritating sensitive skin
may help skin feel calmer and more comfortable
formulated with soothing botanicals traditionally used for delicate skin
may help reduce the look of redness over time
supports the appearance of a calm, balanced complexion
emotionalHook: sensitive skin that finally gets the gentle care it deserves
ingredientStory: Rose has been a cornerstone of gentle skincare for millennia — from ancient Persian hammams to Indian beauty rituals. Rose Revive distils this tradition into every bar, making it a sanctuary for reactive, sensitive skin.

name: Royal Essence
positioningLine: The luxury of oudh. The comfort of handmade soap.
safeBenefitClaims: designed to help skin feel richly nourished
formulated for skin that appears dry or mature-looking
may help skin look and feel more supple
supports a luxurious, indulgent cleansing experience
formulated with one of the world's most prized botanical ingredients
emotionalHook: luxury that goes beyond fragrance — a soap your skin will thank you for
ingredientStory: Oudh (agarwood) is one of the most prized botanical materials in the world, revered for millennia in Middle Eastern and South Asian rituals. Royal Essence brings this rare ingredient into your daily shower.

name: Calm Essence
positioningLine: Calm your skin. Calm your mind.
safeBenefitClaims: formulated with ingredients traditionally associated with calming sensitive skin
may help skin appear less red and more balanced
designed to gently nourish without upsetting reactive skin
goat milk's natural proteins may help skin feel softer
supports the appearance of a calm, even-toned complexion
emotionalHook: skin that finally stops reacting and starts cooperating
ingredientStory: Goat milk has a pH remarkably close to human skin, making it a naturally compatible cleanser. Lavender, one of the most studied botanicals for calming properties, makes this bar a twice-daily ritual of gentleness.

name: Fresh Blizz
safeBenefitClaims: may help skin appear less oily and more mattified
formulated to support a brighter, fresher-looking complexion
designed to cleanse without stripping the skin's natural balance
vitamin C may help support the appearance of brighter skin
may help minimize the look of enlarged pores over time
emotionalHook: oily skin that finally feels balanced — not stripped, not shiny
ingredientStory: Vitamin C is one of skincare's most studied brightening ingredients. Fresh Blizz combines it with the crisp freshness of lemon and the light, memorable scent of mushk for a cleanse that wakes up your skin and your senses.

name: Purity Guard
positioningLine: Neem + Tulsi. The original Ayurvedic skin guardians.
safeBenefitClaims: formulated with ingredients traditionally used to support clearer-looking skin
may help reduce the appearance of blemishes over time
designed to help minimize the look of breakout-prone skin
neem is one of Ayurveda's most documented botanicals for skin clarity
may help skin appear less congested with regular use
emotionalHook: breakout-prone skin that finally gets an ingredient it can trust
ingredientStory: Neem and tulsi have been used as skin guardians in Indian households for generations — long before modern actives were synthesized. Purity Guard brings this ancient combination into a cold-process bar formulated for daily use.

name: CharLuna Glow
safeBenefitClaims: activated charcoal may help draw out the look of impurities
kaolin clay is known to gently absorb excess surface oil
designed for skin that looks congested or prone to breakouts
may help support a cleaner, clearer-looking complexion
lily extract helps balance the deeper cleanse with gentle botanical care
emotionalHook: pores that finally look clean — not just on the surface
ingredientStory: Activated charcoal works like a magnet for the look of impurities. Kaolin clay gently absorbs excess oil without stripping. Lily and vetiver add a grounding, floral balance to every wash.

name: Amber Calm
positioningLine: A warm, grounding detox for skin that needs a reset.
safeBenefitClaims: designed to support a deep yet nourishing cleanse
charcoal and clay help draw out the appearance of impurities
may help skin look and feel refreshed after a week of pollution exposure
formulated for skin that appears dull and congested
aromatic ingredients that turn your shower into a ritual
emotionalHook: skin that craves a real reset — not just a quick rinse
ingredientStory: Patchouli, clove, and cedarwood have long been used in aromatherapeutic skincare for their warm, grounding properties. Combined with the purifying power of charcoal and kaolin, Amber Calm is a full-sensory detox experience.

name: Sandal Radiance
positioningLine: The classic Indian glow — sandalwood wisdom in every bar.
safeBenefitClaims: sandalwood has centuries of documented use in Indian brightening rituals
may help support the look of a more even, radiant skin tone
kokum butter is deeply nourishing for skin that looks dull
designed to support a glowing, healthy-looking complexion
may help reduce the appearance of uneven tone over regular use
emotionalHook: the glow that Indian beauty has trusted since ancient times
ingredientStory: Sandalwood (chandan) is arguably the most iconic ingredient in Indian skincare. Red sandalwood adds its own brightening legacy. Kokum butter — a uniquely Indian fat — rounds out this bar with deep, non-greasy moisture.

name: Hair Vitalizer
positioningLine: The Ayurvedic trio your hair has been waiting for.
safeBenefitClaims: reetha is a natural, plant-based alternative to synthetic surfactants
amla is traditionally associated with supporting hair strength and shine
shikakai may help support a clean, balanced scalp
designed to cleanse hair without stripping natural oils
may help hair appear shinier and more manageable with regular use
emotionalHook: hair that looks stronger and shinier without a single synthetic surfactant
ingredientStory: Reetha, amla, and shikakai — the legendary Ayurvedic hair care trio. Used together in Indian households for centuries, they form the backbone of natural hair cleansing that supports scalp balance and shine.
